name: Apple Crumb Muffins WW
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Crumb Topping:
1/4 cup Flour, all-purpose
2 tbsp Sugar, granulated
2 tablespoons Margarine (melted)
1/8 tsp Cinnamon, ground
Batter Preparation:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a 12-cup muffin pan with paper baking cups.
In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and apple pie spice.
In a separate bowl, mix milk, shredded apple, and melted margarine with the egg until combined.
Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed; do not overmix.
Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
Baking:
Sprinkle an equal amount of crumb topping over each muffin in the pan.
Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
